us001.question_text: [In the past 28 days/4 weeks], which of the following online services have you used? Check the box next to all that apply.

us001_other.question_text: Which online communications services that were not listed have you used [in the past 28 days/4 weeks]?

us002.question_text: Please indicate how often you have used [platform] [in the past 28 days/4 weeks].

us003.question_text: [In the past 28 days/4 weeks/Since the last time you answered on], have you personally witnessed or experienced something that affected you negatively on [platform]?

us004.question_text: What was the impact of your negative experience(s) with [platform]? Check the box next to all that apply.

us004_other.question_text: Free-text follow-up to us004 when 'Other' is selected.
us004_other.construct: Impact of Negative Personal Experience — Other (free text)

us005.question_text: Did your experience(s) on [platform] relate to any of these topics? Check the box next to all that apply.

us006.question_text: In a sentence or two, please describe one experience on [platform] that personally affected you negatively.

us007.question_text: [In the past 28 days/4 weeks/Since the last time you answered on], have you witnessed or experienced content that you would consider bad for the world on [platform] (examples could include content that is misleading, hateful, or unnecessarily divisive)?

us008.question_text: What negative impact do you feel your experience(s) with [platform] could have on the world? Check the box next to all that apply.

us008_other.question_text: Free-text follow-up to us008 when 'Other' is selected.

us009.question_text: In a few words, please describe which group(s) would be the likely target of this increase in fear, anger, divisiveness, or hate on [platform]?

us016.question_text: Did your experience(s) on [platform] relate to any of these topics? Check the box next to all that apply.

us017.question_text: In a sentence or two, please describe one experience on [platform] with content that you would consider bad for the world.

us010.question_text: [In the past 28 days/4 weeks/Since the last time you answered on], have you experienced a meaningful connection with others on [platform] (examples could include exchanging emotional support or bonding over shared experiences)?

us011.question_text: In a sentence or two, please describe one experience on [platform] where you meaningfully connected with others. Please include who you connected with.

us012.question_text: [In the past 28 days/4 weeks/Since the last time you answered on], have you learned something that was useful or that helped you understand something important on [platform]?

us013.question_text: In a sentence or two, please describe one experience on [platform] where you learned something useful or which helped you understand something important. Please include what you learned.

us014.question_text: [In the past 28 days], have you wanted to post something or make a comment on any online service and then refrained?

us015.question_text: In a sentence or two, please state why you refrained.

us018a.question_text: Using [platform] is something ...that I do automatically
us018a.construct: Platform Habit/Attitude — that I do automatically

us018b.question_text: Using [platform] is something ...that I do without thinking
us018b.construct: Platform Habit/Attitude — that I do without thinking

us018c.question_text: Using [platform] is something ...that has a positive effect on me
us018c.construct: Platform Habit/Attitude — that has a positive effect on me

us018d.question_text: Using [platform] is something ...that has a negative effect on me
us018d.construct: Platform Habit/Attitude — that has a negative effect on me

us018e.question_text: Using [platform] is something ...that I spend too much time using
us018e.construct: Platform Habit/Attitude — that I spend too much time using

us018f.question_text: Using [platform] is something ...that facilitates my learning and growth
us018f.construct: Platform Habit/Attitude — that facilitates my learning and growth

us018g.question_text: Using [platform] is something ...that strengthens and supports my relationships
us018g.construct: Platform Habit/Attitude — that strengthens and supports my relationships

us019_hours.question_text: On average, how much time per day did you spend using [platform] over the past 4 weeks? (Hours portion.)
us019_hours.construct: Time Per Day on Platform — Hours

us019_minutes.question_text: On average, how much time per day did you spend using [platform] over the past 4 weeks? (Minutes portion.)
us019_minutes.construct: Time Per Day on Platform — Minutes

us019_time_min.question_text: Total minutes per day spent on the platform, derived from us019_hours * 60 + us019_minutes.
us019_time_min.construct: Time Per Day on Platform — Total Minutes (derived)

us020.question_text: Please indicate how often you have had in-person interactions in the past 4 weeks.

us021.question_text: In the past 4 weeks, have you experienced a meaningful connection with others during your in-person interactions?

us022.question_text: In the past 4 weeks, have you learned something that was useful or that helped you understand something important during your in-person interactions?

us023.question_text: In the past 4 weeks, have you witnessed or experienced something that you would consider bad for the world during your in-person interactions?

us024.question_text: In the past 4 weeks, have you personally witnessed or experienced something that affected you negatively during your in-person interactions?

us025.question_text: Did your experience(s) on [platform] relate to any of these topics? (Asked after us010=Yes; topic codes for the meaningful-connection experience.) Check the box next to all that apply.

us026.question_text: Did your experience(s) on [platform] relate to any of these topics? (Asked after us012=Yes; topic codes for the useful-learning experience.) Check the box next to all that apply.

gms001.question_text: I primarily used social media on the following devices (Select all that apply):

gms001_other.question_text: Please specify which other unlisted device you used social media on.
gms001_other.construct: Social Media Context — Devices Other (free text)

gms002.question_text: I primarily used social media around the following people (Select all that apply):

gms003.question_text: I primarily used social media in the following locations (Select all that apply):

gms004.question_text: I primarily used social media while also performing the following OFFLINE activities (Select all that apply):

gms005.question_text: I primarily used social media when I was in the following types of situations (Select all that apply):

ai_concerned.question_text: How concerned or not concerned are you about the increased use of artificial intelligence computer programs in daily life?

ai_excited.question_text: How excited or not excited are you about the increased use of artificial intelligence computer programs in daily life?

ai_used.question_text: In the past 28 days, have you used any of the following AI services (e.g., ChatGPT, Stable Diffusion)?

ai_used_exp.question_text: In a sentence or two, please describe one experience where you used an AI service. What did you use it for, what were the results, and how did you feel about the experience?

ai_effect_a.question_text: Do you feel more excited or more concerned about... The effects of artificial intelligence computer programs on the education of our youth?

ai_effect_b.question_text: Do you feel more excited or more concerned about... The effects of artificial intelligence computer programs on people's relationships with family and friends?

ai_effect_c.question_text: Do you feel more excited or more concerned about... The effects of artificial intelligence computer programs on people's psychological well-being?

ai_effect_d.question_text: Do you feel more excited or more concerned about... The effects of artificial intelligence computer programs on the military?

ai_effect_e.question_text: Do you feel more excited or more concerned about... The effects of artificial intelligence computer programs on health care?

ai_effect_f.question_text: Do you feel more excited or more concerned about... The effects of artificial intelligence computer programs on minorities and vulnerable groups?

ai_effect_g.question_text: Do you feel more excited or more concerned about... The effects of artificial intelligence computer programs on job opportunities for people?

ai_other_concerns.question_text: Do you have concerns about the increasing use of technology in daily life that were not asked about? Please describe them in a sentence or two.

ai_ideas.question_text: In a sentence or two, what ideas do you have for making technology better for you and/or for society?
ai_ideas.construct: AI/Tech — Ideas for Better Tech (free text)

q_ai1.question_text: In the past 4 weeks, have you used applications that use AI to generate human-like text or code, such as ChatGPT, Bard, or Bing Chat?
q_ai1.construct: AI Tool Used — Text/Code Generation (e.g., ChatGPT, Bard, Bing Chat)

q_ai8a_1.question_text: You said earlier that you had used applications that use AI to generate human-like text or code, such as ChatGPT, Bard, or Bing Chat. What did you use it for? Please select all that apply.
q_ai8a_1.construct: AI Tool Purposes — Text/Code Generation (e.g., ChatGPT, Bard, Bing Chat) (multiselect)

q_ai10_1.question_text: In a sentence or two, please describe why your experience(s) with applications that use AI to generate human-like text or code, such as ChatGPT, Bard, or Bing Chat was or was not useful.
q_ai10_1.construct: AI Tool Usefulness — Why (Text/Code Generation (e.g., ChatGPT, Bard, Bing Chat)) (free text)

q_ai11_1.question_text: For each of the activities you selected, please rate how useful or not useful your use of applications that use AI to generate human-like text or code, such as ChatGPT, Bard, or Bing Chat was to you.
q_ai11_1.construct: AI Tool Usefulness Rating — Text/Code Generation (e.g., ChatGPT, Bard, Bing Chat) (battery)

q_ai12_1.question_text: In a sentence or two, please describe why your experience(s) with applications that use AI to generate human-like text or code, such as ChatGPT, Bard, or Bing Chat was or was not harmful.

ex004a.question_text: How much should major technology companies be regulated by the government?

ex004b.question_text: Do you think technology companies should do more, do less, or keep doing what they are now to protect the integrity of elections?

ex005a.question_text: How much do you oppose or support the following playing an important role in shaping and developing AI? — Government

ex005b.question_text: How much do you oppose or support the following playing an important role in shaping and developing AI? — Corporations

ex005c.question_text: How much do you oppose or support the following playing an important role in shaping and developing AI? — Universities

ex006a.construct: AI Governance Belief — Free Data Use

ex006b.question_text: Companies should be required to make anonymized user data available to independent researchers and auditors

ex006c.question_text: How much do you agree with the idea that society should invest in the development of new superintelligent AI systems that perform better than humans on almost any task?

ex006d.question_text: If companies do develop new superintelligent AI systems that perform better than humans on almost any task, it is critical that there be processes for all people / the general public to have input into the development and potential uses of such systems.
ex006d.construct: AI Governance Belief — Public Input on Super AI

citizenus.question_text: Are you a citizen of the United States?

statereside.question_text: In what state are you currently residing?

gender.question_text: Gender — value preloaded from the UAS panel tracker rather than asked in each wave.

age.question_text: Age in years — preloaded from the UAS panel tracker.

race.question_text: Race — preloaded from the UAS panel tracker. Combined with hisplatino during cleaning to produce a unified race/ethnicity category.

hisplatino.question_text: Hispanic/Latino identity flag — preloaded from the UAS panel tracker. Combined with race during cleaning.

education.question_text: Educational attainment — preloaded from the UAS panel tracker.

hhincome.question_text: Household income — preloaded from the UAS panel tracker.

maritalstatus.question_text: Marital status — preloaded from the UAS panel tracker.

primary_respondent.question_text: Whether this respondent is the primary respondent for their household (per UAS panel metadata).

bornus.question_text: Whether respondent was born in the United States — preloaded from the UAS panel tracker.

stateborn.question_text: State (or country) of birth — preloaded from the UAS panel tracker.

language.question_text: Survey language preference recorded by the UAS panel tracker.

dateofbirth_year.question_text: Year of birth — preloaded from the UAS panel tracker (more precise than the bucketed `age` field).

agerange.question_text: Age range bucket — preloaded from the UAS panel tracker.

regis.question_text: Regardless of whether you voted in the November 8 2022 election, were you registered to vote using your current address (or by absentee) in time to cast a ballot in the election if you had chosen to do so?

party_affil.question_text: Regardless of if or how you are registered to vote, are you more closely aligned with...

lean_affil.question_text: Generally speaking, do you lean more toward affiliating with Democrats or with Republicans?

rate_self.question_text: On a scale from 0 to 100 where 0 is the most liberal and 100 is the most conservative, what number would you give to yourself?

scim_therm_con.question_text: Please indicate how you feel toward conservatives using the scale below. 10 means that you feel very favorably or warm toward them, 0 that you feel very unfavorable or cold, and 5 is neutral.

scim_therm_lib.question_text: Please indicate how you feel toward liberals using the scale below. 10 means that you feel very favorably or warm toward them, 0 that you feel very unfavorable or cold, and 5 is neutral.

scim_friends_con.question_text: How comfortable are you having friends who are conservative? 10 means that you feel extremely comfortable, 0 means that you do not feel comfortable at all.

scim_friends_lib.question_text: How comfortable are you having friends who are liberal? 10 means that you feel extremely comfortable, 0 means that you do not feel comfortable at all.

vote2024.question_text: Regardless of whether you voted in the presidential election in November, which of the two major party candidates did you prefer to have as the President of the United States for the next four years?

cs_001.question_text: Could you tell us how interesting or uninteresting you found the questions in this survey?

cs_003.question_text: Do you have any other comments on the survey? Please type these in the box below.
